name: Cramped in the Train
description:
It's a good bot. Trust me. You can do anything you want. The scenario is very open ended. You can go the obvious route, become a serial killer, become a mad scientist, cause a zombie apocalypse, bring out a machine gun out of nowhere or anything you want.

If you enjoy this bot, please check out School-Life Drama by clicking on my profile which is by far the most detailed bot I have ever made.
creator: Light_____
